message:
feat(ftui): async search dispatch via Cmd::task + wildcard fallback toggle (2noh9.3.2)

Complete the search bar UX bead:
- SearchRequested now dispatches via Cmd::task when a SearchService is
  available, with proper error handling via SearchFailed
- Empty/whitespace-only queries are short-circuited (no dispatch)
- Ctrl+F toggles the wildcard fallback indicator (per keymap RFC)
- 4 new tests: wildcard toggle, empty-query skip, service dispatch, no-service noop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
